author: @marcelkargul
text:
we don't send brand guidelines as a PDF.

we build clients a password protected brand portal. they log in, download assets, copy colors, grab icons and banners. everything in one place.

this is how it should be done. https://t.co/y5aTRygKDT https://t.co/YOHauOLGld

included.text:
Meet the new Folk 🐣

- now free with our new generous free plan
- contact support and talk to us directly from iMessage or Telegram
- location is way more reliable. "stop me when i'm at Burger King" or "pull up my workout once i'm at Equinox" actually work now
- new branding and logo
- better personality and enhanced memory
- folk learns 24/7 while you sleep
